prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约11097→12308→13603→16588→15016，整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约2700名；2025年基准约15016名，较2024年有所回升（减少1 572名），显示报考热度阶段性回暖；本省物理类计划2021年66人、2022年63人、2023年68人、2024年72人、2025年79人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划82 人，较2025年增加3人（+3.8%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争缓解作用不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第81位持续上升至2026年第72 位，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力与认可度增强；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第96位（评价“一般”），短视频曝光量 中等，未出现爆发式关注升温；材料科学与工程获评第五轮学科评估A等级，纺织科学与工程为双一流建设学科，在相关领域具有较强学科优势，对物理类考生 有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等物理类核心专业在2026年专业热度分析中均为“高热推荐”或“推荐”，社会报考意愿强 烈；本省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约8.4%，竞争显著加剧；东华大学位于上海，对湖南考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在湖南招生占比约2.5%（2024年数据），跨省招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升趋势、2026 年小幅扩招（+3.8%）、学校排名持续上升、物理类考生大幅增加（+8.4%）以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热，预计2026年报考竞争较2025年进一步加剧，位次数字将有 所减小（更难进）；预测最低位次约15158名，区间14658–15658名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11097 → 12308 → 13603 → 16588 → 15016, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2700 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 15016, which is a rebound compared to 2024 (a decrease of 1572 places), indicating a phased recovery in application popularity; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 66 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 68 in 2023, 72 in 2024, and 79 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year; the 2026 plan is 82 students, an increase of 3 students (+3.8%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion, having little effect on easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, reflecting the university's improving comprehensive strength and recognition; in recent years, the reputation has been stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or records of enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (rated as 'average'), with moderate short video exposure, no explosive increase in attention; Materials Science and Engineering was rated A in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, and Textile Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class construction discipline, with strong disciplinary advantages in related fields, attracting some Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core Physics Category majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2026 major popularity analysis, with strong social application willingness; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 325,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Hunan candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2.5% (2024 data), with stable cross-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the small expansion in 2026 (+3.8%), the continuous rise in university rankings, the significant increase in Physics Category candidates (+8.4%), and the sustained high popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, it is expected that competition for 2026 applications will further intensify compared to 2025, with the ranking number decreasing (harder to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is about 15158, with a range of 14658–15658.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 15158, range 14658–15658. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; candidates significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 14600) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence; candidates near the upper bound (above 15600) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors, while also considering Tier 2 medium majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2362 → 2464 → 2370 → 2624 → 2747, showing a gradual backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 377 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2747, the highest ranking number in the past 5 years (easiest to enter); the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 14 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 10 in 2025, with significant fluctuations; the 2026 plan is 9, a decrease of 1 (-10%) from 2025, a clear signal of enrollment reduction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science China University Rankings have steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, showing a stable improvement in ranking, which also has brand appeal for liberal arts candidates; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or records of enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (rated 'average'), with moderate exposure; Materials Science and Engineering is rated A (mainly for engineering), while liberal arts majors (such as economics and management, journalism and communication, foreign languages) have no A- or above discipline evaluations, but the overall 211 level of the school still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Economics and Management Pilot Class and Economics and Trade Category correspond to finance/economics/economics majors, with a 2026 major popularity of 'differentiated wait-and-see'; the Journalism and Communication Category corresponds to journalism and communication majors, with a 2026 popularity of 'clearly discouraged'; the number of History Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 187,000, a sharp increase of about 31.2% from 142,500 in 2025, leading to a drastic intensification of competition; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal for Hunan liberal arts candidates; cross-provincial enrollment scale is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of rankings in 2025, the enrollment reduction in 2026 (-10%), the surge in History Category candidates (+31.2%), and the significant cooling of social popularity for liberal arts majors such as journalism and communication, it is expected that the competition for applications in 2026 will be significantly more intense than in 2025, with ranking numbers clearly decreasing (harder to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is about 2502, with a range of 2052–2952.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 2502, with a range of 2052–2952. If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, Tier 1 for a sprint, and Tier 3 as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2050), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Economics and Trade Category and Economics and Management Pilot Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above 2900), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors such as Japanese as a safety net. Note that the social popularity of the Journalism and Communication Category is clearly discouraged, so careful evaluation of employment prospects is needed when applying.
